_comment: Unified prompt-router config (P1-T2). Generated as trigger-floor.json UNION additions (Charter v3 §1/§2). The router loads and evaluates the ENTIRE trigger floor at runtime (classify.py::_floor_index), so every legacy rule is reachable — consumes_entire_floor=true is what build-trigger-floor.py --check verifies for floor->config coverage. Removals from the floor are forbidden; router-only tuning lives under 'additions'.

priority_tiers.0: gate-adjacent — first-write skill push, TDD init, dox (never budget-dropped)
priority_tiers.1: substrate precedence — jcodemunch>lean-ctx (code), jdocmunch>lean-ctx (docs), sequential-thinking, graphify
priority_tiers.2: ranked skill pushes (skills-index x weights); per-skill ids so a NEW skill always fires

dedup.invariant: suppresses verbatim re-injection only; never suppresses a first fire (P1-T11 test)

trivial_fast_exit.note: the legacy '<12 chars' heuristic is DROPPED as trigger-unsafe (Charter §1)

additions._comment: Router-only trigger ADDITIONS atop the floor (never removals). Empty today; grows as new intents are added post-cutover — every addition must keep build-trigger-floor.py --check green.
